sentence_reviews.text: Reliability and cost operations manage failures, replication, quotas, capacity, security, energy, carbon, and economic efficiency across AI workloads.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Reviewed as synthesis across cited source pointers and, where applicable, the canonical atlas graph context.
sentence_reviews.notes: Former ambiguity resolved by narrowing the audit interpretation to synthesis support rather than requiring exact-source wording.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: DDIA directly supports fault tolerance and distributed systems concepts.
sentence_reviews.notes: Strong conceptual support, but not exact phrase-level verification.

sentence_reviews.text: Operational gains introduce new failure modes in concurrency, versioning, security, numerical behavior, observability, and cost. Its direct dependencies include Distributed systems & networking, Adversarial robustness & security testing.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Synthesized from cited node sources plus the atlas dependency context in data/atlas.json.
sentence_reviews.notes: Limitation is reviewed as a broad synthesis/tradeoff statement for the family-level node, not as a direct quotation from one source.
